title: Scope to improve
policy: Public sources only. No confidential, internal, or customer data. Scores from public signal clusters.

kargo.name: Baseline
gaps: Self-serve AI optimization parity vs TTD Kokai / StackAdapt
Retail media graph depth vs Criteo / Amazon

gaps.label: Retail Media
gaps.whyItMatters: Public retail-media ARR and RMN deals are pulling brand budgets.
gaps.recommendedMove: Bridge RMN audiences into offsite high-impact creative.

gaps.label: AI Optimization
gaps.whyItMatters: Leaders productize goal-based bidding; public hiring and launches prove it.
gaps.recommendedMove: Ship goal → optimize for high-impact formats.

gaps.label: Identity
gaps.whyItMatters: Peer graphs (UID2, commerce IDs) show up in patents and product posts.
gaps.recommendedMove: Deepen partner ID integrations; don’t rebuild a full graph.

gaps.label: Ctv
gaps.whyItMatters: CTV remains a public investment theme across DSPs and SSPs.
gaps.recommendedMove: Pair Kargo creative with ClearLine / premium CTV paths.

gaps.label: Measurement
gaps.whyItMatters: Attention language is spreading in public conference agendas.
gaps.recommendedMove: Publish a short attention → brand-outcomes method card.

gaps.label: Creative
gaps.whyItMatters: Kargo leads high-impact creative; peers are closing via generative tooling.
gaps.recommendedMove: Productize generative variants inside Kargo formats.

gaps.label: Mobile High Impact
gaps.whyItMatters: Public scores still favor Kargo on high-impact mobile.
gaps.recommendedMove: Defend with proof packs; extend formats into CTV/commerce.

method: Scope to improve = peer max − baseline. Derived from public signal clusters only — not private data.
